bug.description: thread-unsafe access to global or shared variable without proper synchronization

prompt:
There is a thread-unsafe access to global or shared variable without proper synchronization downstream of function lte_ue_measurements_emul in the openair1/PHY/LTE_ESTIMATION subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/LTE_ESTIMATION/lte_ue_measurements.c:1306.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
